title: Ray's Better Heavy Core (broken)
description: Trying your luck with the newly added trial chambers, and it's not your lucky day? Well try this, balanced vanilla like crafting recipe for the heavy core item. Survival friendly.
body:
Balanced & survival friendly crafting recipe for the heavy core item:

<details>
<summary>Crafting Recipe</summary>

- 3 x iron ingot
- 2 x chiseled deepslate
- 1 x wind charge 
- 3 x polished deepslate

</details>



![craftable heavy core](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9339692c4f159775abafd874e7b19cea2e91f3a1.jpeg)
